query:
UPDATE radio_channels SET streamUrl = 'https://ice5.somafm.com/darkzone-128-mp3', metadata = JSON_SET(COALESCE(metadata, '{}'), '$.fallbackUrl', 'https://ice5.somafm.com/deepspaceone-128-mp3') WHERE id = 47;
UPDATE radio_channels SET streamUrl = 'https://listen.181fm.com/181-technoclub_128k.mp3', metadata = JSON_SET(COALESCE(metadata, '{}'), '$.fallbackUrl', 'https://listen.181fm.com/181-energy98_128k.mp3') WHERE id = 48
command:
